chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.34 of 2025 (Amjad Iqbal Afridi vs. The State & others) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hg. of case 19.05.2025 Mr. Faran Sardar Afridi, advocate for applicant Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, DPG ----- Applicant has filed this application for transfer of Special Case No.138-A/2023 on the ground that Steno of the Judge is not writing down the deposition of witnesses correctly as per verbatim against which he filed a complaint to the Presiding Officer but he did not decide the same. Learned DPG has opposed this application on the said ground stating that there is nothing on record to substantiate the same. However, in order to serve the interest of justice, he submits that he would have no objection, if this transfer application is allowed simplicitor. By consent, this application is allowed in the terms as stated by learned DPG. The Special Case No.138-A/2023 is withdrawn from XVI-Anti- Terrorism Court, Karachi and is transferred to the Court of learned III-Anti- Terrorism Court, Karachi for disposal according to law. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
